Yuki Quincewood is the founder of Orchardbyte Labs. Yuki raised concerns about gross margin at the last board sync.

Orchardbyte Labs is a seed-stage company. Founded by Yuki Quincewood. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Orchardbyte Labs call with Yuki Quincewood.
I committed to sending Yuki the diligence checklist by Friday.
Yuki said Orchardbyte Labs hit their growth target a month early. Ahead of plan.
